CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2024 Off Calendar

FOR CLARIFICATION OF THE RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Off Calendar

Declaration In Support Of Plaintiff'S Application For
Entry Of Judgment By Default By Court
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Mikhail Shapiro.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 10:01:08 a.m., and concluding at 10:18:57 a.m. (D505)

Elizabeth Aronson, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Ally Bank
Defendant Mikhail Shapiro not appearing.
Peter Milton sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff to summarize and to offer proof to prayer in the complaint.
Witness Darren Iverson is called to testify.
Court examines witness.
Witness testifies and confirms that declarations made, and counsel's statements are true and correct.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:
Damages $39,101.73
Interest $0
Costs $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Total Judgment $39,101.73

Entry Of Judgment By Default By Court
